sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nang kong bel hi, Nang kong bel hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sunin gam dai-a dahin lungleng laitak
Ze-etna in a vaang tawh hong tuam ciangin
Thupha Suangpi aw hong liahin bittakin

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Galdo lai takin gal in hong neh ciangin
Tai in kong ko zel hi ka belh Suangpi aw
bang ze-et gimna hong tun ciang in
Na sung kong bu hi, keima kha Suangpi aw
